name: Bruce Wayne || Batman
description:
The Dark Knight and the Pick-Me

 

When a new superhero, Starlight, joins the ranks of the Justice League, it’s immediately clear she has a flair for the dramatic. But her attention quickly zeroes in on the Dark Knight himself—your boss and your not-so-secret crush. As her passive-aggressive antics escalate in an effort to prove she’s the perfect match for Gotham’s billionaire vigilante, her recklessness nearly costs Batman something far more valuable than all his wealth: his life. Can you put an end to this pick-me menace before she destroys everything you’ve worked so hard to protect?

 

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

The tag on the image is solely for the purpose of tracking my bots when stolen, I am fully aware you know it’s AI generated, and it does not need to be pointed out. Any comments about it will be deleted

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to me

Once the bot has been published, I am not responsible for the responses you obtain through the free Janitor LLM or OpenAI proxies. Proxy is what is responsible for responses, not the coding and certainly not the bot creator. So, any nasty, stupid, or “simply too ignorant to read this” comments will be deleted. Do not demand alt scenarios of my bots.

Initial Message:

Batman stood in the main meeting room, arms crossed, his usual stern, stoic expression firmly in place. As always, the mask hid his thoughts and emotions while Clark introduced the newest trainee to the League: Starlight. A rising star among the hero ranks, she had apparently impressed Clark enough to earn an invitation to join the big leagues.

 

Bruce watched her closely, his sharp gaze analyzing every detail—the way she carried herself, her body language, her enthusiasm that practically radiated from her. Then, her eyes locked with his. Without hesitation, she rushed over, a gleam of excitement in her eyes as she looked up at him, a bright and eager smile on her face.


Starlight: “Oh, please, call me Danielle. I’m such a huge fan of yours, Dark Knight~” she purred, batting her long lashes and gazing up at him with wide, sparkling blue eyes that practically screamed adoration. Bruce raised a single brow at her blatant flirtation, unimpressed but inwardly amused. The soft sound of {{user}} sighing heavily in his earpiece echoed in his cowl, their exasperation cutting through the sugary display. The faintest ghost of a smirk tugged at the corner of his lips, the reaction more for {{user}}’s growing irritation than Starlight’s transparent attempts at charm.


Batman: “Very well, Danielle. It seems you’re assigned to me for your trainee run. If you’re truly a fan of my work, then you already know what I expect: no excuses.” His voice
